sentences.text_original: 你下个周末有空吗？我想去找你玩。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xià ge zhōumò yǒu kòng ma? Wǒ xiǎng qù zhǎo nǐ wán.
sentences.text_translation: Keyingi dam olish kunlari bo'shmisan? Oldingga borib aylanmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты свободен в следующие выходные? Хочу приехать к тебе в гости.
sentences.text_translation_en: Are you free next weekend? I'd like to come visit you.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有！你什么时候来？我去车站接你。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu! Nǐ shénme shíhou lái? Wǒ qù chēzhàn jiē nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'sh! Qachon kelasan? Seni bekatdan kutib olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Свободен! Когда приедешь? Встречу тебя на вокзале.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes! When are you coming? I'll pick you up at the station.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我打算周六早上去，坐高铁，大概两个小时就到。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ dǎsuàn zhōuliù zǎoshang qù, zuò gāotiě, dàgài liǎng ge xiǎoshí jiù dào.
sentences.text_translation: Shanba ertalab bormoqchiman, tezyurar poyezdda, taxminan ikki soatda yetib boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Планирую поехать в субботу утром на скоростном поезде, примерно за два часа доберусь.
sentences.text_translation_en: I plan to go Saturday morning by high-speed train — it's about two hours.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还没。我现在准备在网上买。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méi. Wǒ xiànzài zhǔnbèi zài wǎngshàng mǎi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё нет. Сейчас собираюсь купить онлайн.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet. I'm about to buy it online now.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你最好提前订，周末人多，票可能不好买。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì hǎo tíqián dìng, zhōumò rén duō, piào kěnéng bù hǎo mǎi.
sentences.text_translation: Oldindan band qilganing ma'qul, dam olish kunlari odam ko'p, chipta topish qiyin bo'lishi mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Лучше забронируй заранее: на выходных много людей, билеты, возможно, будет трудно достать.
sentences.text_translation_en: You'd better book in advance — weekends are busy, tickets might be hard to get.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你说得对，我现在就看看。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, wǒ xiànzài jiù kàn kan.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're right, I'll check right now.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你看，这趟车还有票。二等座一百五十块。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn, zhè tàng chē hái yǒu piào. Èrděng zuò yībǎi wǔshí kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Qara, bu reysda hali chipta bor ekan. Ikkinchi toifa o'rin bir yuz ellik yuan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Смотри, на этот рейс ещё есть билеты. Место второго класса — сто пятьдесят юаней.
sentences.text_translation_en: Look, this train still has tickets. A second-class seat is a hundred fifty yuan.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 价格还可以。座位选靠窗的吗？
sentences.pinyin: Jiàgé hái kěyǐ. Zuòwèi xuǎn kàochuāng de ma?
sentences.text_translation: Narxi o'rtacha ekan. O'rinni deraza yonidan tanlaysanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Цена нормальная. Место выберешь у окна?
sentences.text_translation_en: The price is okay. Are you choosing a window seat?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 对，我选了靠窗的座位，可以看风景。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, wǒ xuǎn le kàochuāng de zuòwèi, kěyǐ kàn fēngjǐng.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, deraza yonidagi o'rinni tanladim, manzarani ko'rsa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, выбрал место у окна, можно любоваться видами.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, I chose a window seat so I can enjoy the scenery.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那挺好的。你到了给我打电话，我去接你。
sentences.pinyin: Nà tǐng hǎo de. Nǐ dào le gěi wǒ dǎ diànhuà, wǒ qù jiē nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda yaxshi. Yetib kelsang menga qo'ng'iroq qil, kutib olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это здорово. Как приедешь, позвони мне — я тебя встречу.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's great. Call me when you arrive and I'll come get you.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好！我买好了。周六早上见！
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo! Wǒ mǎi hǎo le. Zhōuliù zǎoshang jiàn!
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi! Sotib oldim. Shanba ertalab ko'rishamiz!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо! Я купил. Увидимся в субботу утром!
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay! I've bought it. See you Saturday morning!
sentences.speaker: A
